x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Eligibility Evaluation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Determines whether a customer or account qualifies for the credit plan according to predefined criteria.

Comment:
Examples:

Customers credit score meets minimum requirement

Customer has required income or deposit balance

No default or overdue history

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Calculates the financial aspects of the credit plan, such as interest, fees, charges, and repayment amounts.

Includes:
Interest calculation (simple or compound)
Fee and charge computation
Payment scheduling

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Disbursement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Handles the actual execution of the credit plan, such as disbursing funds, activating limits, or allocating credit.

Comment:
Examples:

Loan amount transferred to customer account

Credit card limit activated

Overdraft facility made available

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Transaction Processing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Records all transactions related to the credit plan, including repayments, adjustments, and charges.

Includes:
Posting of interest and fees
Principal reduction
Ledger updates

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Payment Scheduling and Management
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Manages the schedule of repayments, installments, and dues associated with the credit plan.

Includes:
Creating repayment plan
Tracking missed payments
Adjusting schedule if restructuring occurs

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Notification
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Communicates relevant information to the customer regarding the credit plan.

Comment:
Examples:
SMS or email reminders for repayment due dates

Alerts for upcoming interest rate changes

Notifications of credit limit changes

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Adjustment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows modifications to credit plan terms or conditions when required.

Comment:
Examples:
Loan restructuring

Extension of repayment term

Change in interest rate or installment amount

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Monitoring and Reporting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tracks and reports on the credit plans performance and status for operational and management purposes.

Includes:
Credit plan utilization reports
Delinquency and overdue reports
Performance metrics for management

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Plan Closure
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Manages closure of the credit plan once obligations are fulfilled.

Comment:
Examples:
Final payment settlement

Release of collateral

Closure confirmation sent to customer
